heading: circle Example
body:
The following query uses the `geoWithin` operator with the `circle`
field to search for properties within one mile radius of specified
coordinates in Canada.

The query includes a:

- [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit) stage to limit the output to `3` results

- [$project](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/project) stage to exclude all fields except `name`
  and `address`.

> **Note:** You don't need to specify indexes named `default` in your MongoDB Search
> query. If your index has any other name, you must specify the
> `index` field.

***

➤ Use the **Select your language** drop-down menu on this page to
set the language of the examples in this section.
